examples: He took the pen between his thumb and forefinger.
Frannie shushed her with a forefinger to the lips.
I made do with some peanut butter, scooped directly from the jar with a forefinger: why dirty a spoon?
He answers his own question by putting his thumb and forefinger together in a big round 0.
It transpired that Stevens had fractured the forefinger of his left hand and will be out for a month.
